creator: marklmi26-fbsd@yahoo.com
text:
(In reply to mikael.urankar from comment #19)

FYI: with the other patches as well, applying:

http://build.humusoft.cz/patches/www/qt5-webkit/qt5-webkit.diff

allowed www/qt5-webkit to build just fine.




Note: To get this far a patch from bugzilla 215974 for
audio/liba52 was also needed.
